Every Philip Rivers TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Philip Rivers has thrown 448 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Philip Rivers has thrown 16 playoff TDs which is about 3.6 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Philip Rivers has connected with Antonio Gates for 90 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 49 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Philip Rivers has accumulated 8,537 yards. That's more passing yards than Shaun Hill (8,295) threw in his entire career.
